creator: simon@olofsson.de
text:
A new patch is available at:
http://olofsson.de/simon/tmp/cmus-2031.patch
Please use this and not the original patch!
It respects NOPORTDOCS and doesn't install libao per default. I moved
TREMOR under the VORBIS Option.
Thanks,
Simon

-- 
Mit freundlichem Gruß,
With best regards,

Simon Olofsson
http://olofsson.de
